Precondition: end_effector_left and end_effector_right are grasping red_box.
Postcondition: red_box is released by end_effector_left and end_effector_right.

Precondition: green_box is accessible and end_effector_left and end_effector_right are available to grasp.
Postcondition: green_box is grasped by end_effector_left and end_effector_right.
